root: ^It's a women's clothing store, flooded with shoppers. Vibrant posters of women wearing designer clothing are plastered on the windows.
^MS SUWAN: Oh, I remember this store.

realvisited: ^This is how the women's clothing store was before: flooded with shoppers. Vibrant posters of women wearing designer clothing are plastered on the windows. The mannequins inside are wearing the latest trends.
^MS SUWAN: I knew those dusty mannequins looked familiar... I remember this store.
